SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-28-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MENKE ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA ZIONS SECURITY ALARMS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY MR. MENKE, OWNER. DEFENDANT MARY ELIZABETH RAVETTI IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE BALANCE ON THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT TO DATE IS $600 TO BE PAID TO THE PLAINTIFF. THE FIRST PAYMENT OF $75 IS DUE 4/15/2022 AND THEREAFTER ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH, WITH A RESOLVE DATE OF NOVEMBER 15TH 2022. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED TO BE HEARD. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. ****THE COURT ALLOWS BOTH PARTIES TO APPEAR BY ZOOM**** PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-17-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2020 - PLAINTIFF MENKE ENTERPRISES, INC., REPRESENTED BY JACOB MENKE IS PRESENT BY COURTCALL. DEFENDANT MARY ELIZABETH RAVETTI IS PRESENT. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF'S PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBTS ARE PRESENTED TO THE COURT. COURT ORDERS PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER OUTSIDE THE COURTROOM TO ALLOW FOR PARTIES TO TALK ABOUT A POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. COURT IS ADJOURNED AT 2:42 P.M. COURT RECOVENES AT 3:00 P.M. COURT IS INFORMED THAT PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT AND A PROGRESS REPORT IS SET. IF NO APPEARANCE, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD PROVIDES A DESCRIPTION OF ALL EVIDENCE PROVIDED BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
